summary: Tested LTC multi-pull bundle feature. IDLE quantity selector works perfectly with correct price math (0.15 * n). CRITICAL: INVOICE state crashes with ReferenceError: totalUsd is not defined — blocks entire invoice/payment flow. Regression: previously-passing invoice UI is now broken by the multi-pull feature.

ui_bugs.issue: ReferenceError: totalUsd is not defined at line 161. `totalUsd` is used inside the INVOICE JSX (`${totalUsd.toFixed(2)}`) but never declared in component scope. `priceUsd` is only defined inside the useEffect closure. Clicking insert-ltc-button crashes the panel and triggers the React uncaught runtime error overlay. state-invoice never renders, invoice-qr / invoice-address / invoice-amount all unreachable, cancel-invoice-button unreachable.

integration_issues.issue: INVOICE state completely broken due to the totalUsd ReferenceError above. Cannot validate invoice-amount scaling (qty-1 vs qty-4), QR total, cancel/reset, or live-listener/live-log because the panel crashes before render.

action_items: In /app/frontend/src/gashapon/InvoicePanel.jsx, add a component-scope constant BEFORE the return, e.g. `const totalUsd = (COIN_META[coin]?.priceUsd || 0.15) * (quantity || 1);` so line 161 has a valid reference. After fix, re-verify: (a) INVOICE lead shows $0.60 and 4 pulls for qty-4; (b) invoice-amount crypto value for qty-4 is ~4x qty-1; (c) cancel returns to IDLE with qty reset to 1; (d) mobile 390 no horizontal scroll.
critical_code_review_comments: InvoicePanel.jsx line 161 references undeclared `totalUsd` — missed during multi-pull feature refactor. Suggest hoisting `const totalUsd = 0.15 * (quantity || 1);` to component top so both the JSX and useEffect share one source of truth (currently useEffect recomputes `priceUsd` separately, which is duplicative).
InvoicePanel has grown to ~290 lines with multiple state branches; consider splitting IDLE/INVOICE/PROCESSING/VERIFIED/REVEALED into sub-components for maintainability.

Local `qty` state in InvoicePanel (line 63) does not reset when parent resetAll is invoked (component stays mounted, IDLE re-render keeps qty=whatever). After Cancel the button label WILL read the previously-selected qty rather than default $0.15. Recommend syncing `qty` with a prop or resetting via useEffect on machineState==='IDLE'. NOTE: could not verify at runtime because INVOICE crashes before Cancel is reachable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: IDLE state fully verified: qty-1..5 buttons active-state toggling works, insert-ltc-button label math correct ($0.15/$0.30/$0.45/$0.60/$0.75). Machine cabinet elements all present, no prize capsules in IDLE. INVOICE state blocked by totalUsd ReferenceError. After main agent fixes, next testing agent should: verify invoice lead text, capture invoice-amount for qty-1 vs qty-4 and assert qty-4 amount is ~4x qty-1 (wait for ticker fetch), verify cancel resets to IDLE with qty-1 default label, mobile 390 responsive (no h-scroll), no JS errors across full flow. Reveal path is unreachable (no simulate button, needs real LTC payment) — do not attempt.
rca of the issue: Root cause: during the multi-pull refactor the developer replaced the previous single-price template literal with `${totalUsd.toFixed(2)}` but forgot to declare the `totalUsd` variable in the component render scope. The useEffect DOES compute a similar `priceUsd = COIN_META[coin]?.priceUsd * quantity` locally, so the intent is clear — the same expression just needs to be hoisted to component scope. Reproduction: (1) load app, (2) click any qty button, (3) click insert-ltc-button → React uncaught runtime error overlay 'totalUsd is not defined' appears immediately, state-invoice never renders. Mitigation: add `const totalUsd = 0.15 * (quantity || 1);` above the return statement in InvoicePanel.
